title: DDI-CDI ProcessingAgent
description: DDI-CDI ProcessingAgent (cls-ProcessingAgent, extends Agent). Orchestrates production activities, linking agents to the activities they perform and environments they operate on.

@id.description: Identifier for this processing agent node

cdi:performs.description: Activities this agent performs (cdi:Activity). Use @id references to Activity nodes defined elsewhere in the graph.

items.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
items.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

cdi:operatesOn.description: Production environments this agent operates on (cdi:ProductionEnvironment)

items.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
items.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

cdi:purpose.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:purpose.description: Purpose or role of this agent
